prevalence.trend: increasing with aging and ischemic heart disease

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Echocardiography to assess regurgitant volume and severity; evaluate symptoms and LV function

publicHealthSystem.screeningCoverage: no screening; diagnosis via auscultation and echo
publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Moderate; access to surgical repair varies

regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Medical therapy for heart failure; surgical repair/replacement; limited transcatheter repair
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Late referral and limited access to valve repair centers
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: SBC guidelines and established surgical programs
